user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the resource management module, so that the feature is available only when the organization needs it
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for enabling the resource management module; Then my choice is applied to the module state

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save my setup selection or save and continue to the next step, so that my configuration is persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen whether to enable resource management; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the selection is saved and I proceed as expected
